sales.description:
CONSTANTINE III, A.D. 407-411. AV Solidus (4.49 gms), Treveri Mint, A.D. 408-411. NGC AU, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Scratches.
RIC-1514; Depeyrot-57/1. Obverse: Pearl-diademed, draped, and cuirassed bust right; Reverse: Constantine, diademed and in military attire standing facing, head right, with foot upon bound captive, holding labarum and victoriola; TROBS. Some scattered scratches are noted in the fields, but this higher grade example remains quite RARE and captivating.

Estimate: 1500 - 3...
